channel.title: Don't Disturb the Wildlife
channel.description: Latest images from the wildlife gallery.

item.title: Blue Bird Gathers Twigs
item.description: A blue and white bird perches on a wooden fence, holding small twigs in its beak with a blurred background.

item.title: Squirrel Leaping Between Branches
item.description: A gray squirrel is captured in motion as it moves across dark tree branches against a light sky.

item.title: Squirrel Watches Dog
item.description: A squirrel is positioned on a tree trunk, looking towards a black dog whose head is visible in the background.

item.title: Two Flickers on a Chimney
item.description: Two birds with spotted plumage are perched on a brick chimney with metal caps against a clear blue sky.

item.title: Pedestrian and Birds on Street
item.description: A person walks on a street holding a cup, with several seagulls and a dark bird nearby, and parked cars line the road.

item.title: Canine Driver in Parking Lot
item.description: A white SUV is parked behind green bushes, with a dog visible in the driver's seat and a person walking in the background.

item.title: Black Bird Landing on Wet Ground
item.description: A dark bird with its wings spread wide is captured in mid-air, descending towards a wet ground with small white objects.

item.title: Crow Eating Bread in Puddle
item.description: A black crow is seen pecking at a piece of bread in a shallow puddle on a dark, wet surface.

item.title: Dog Enjoying Car Ride
item.description: A dog stands on the dashboard, looking out the car window while a person drives the vehicle.
